name: brave_llm_context
description: Brave Search LLM Context — pre-extracted web snippets for grounding (X-Subscription-Token).

env.BRAVE_WEB_CONTEXT: off | when_empty | when_weak | always | auto (explicit web ask, empty RAG, or weak RAG)
env.BRAVE_LLM_CONTEXT_URL: Override base URL if Brave changes path

notes: Integrated in api/routers/chat.py; not wired to MCP in this repo.
